$comment: Option A: tune the solver to MATCH the current hand-authored indaco aesthetic (washy pastels, over-AA bias). Reverse-engineered from the existing --cN-light pairs in themes/indaco.css. AA target ~9 (current dark mode averages ~6.7, but the solver hits target exactly — picking 9 keeps it comfortably above current and pushes lightness toward existing pale values). Per-mode chroma matches existing: ~0.04 in light mode (near-neutral pastel), ~0.13 in dark mode (saturated deep).
